title: A Science Experiment and Its Results
article_text: We did a science experiment to test a new medicine. We took into consideration many factors before we started. The results were strange, so we had to check our code for errors. The data we found could possibly show a new threat to health. It is impossible to ignore this finding because it affects many people. The company hopes the new medicine will enable higher revenue next year. Many people are afraid of getting cancer, and this experiment can help. We need to stay active and healthy to fight disease. The results will convince everyone that this medicine works. The effects of the medicine vary depending on a person's age and environment.

sentences.en: We did a science experiment to test a new medicine.
sentences.zh: 我们做了一个科学实验来测试一种新药。

words.eng_def: a test done to learn something or to see if something works
a substance used to treat illness

sentences.en: We took into consideration many factors before we started.
sentences.zh: 我们在开始前考虑了许多因素。

words.eng_def: the act of thinking about something carefully

sentences.en: The results were strange, so we had to check our code for errors.
sentences.zh: 结果很奇怪，所以我们不得不检查我们的代码是否有错误。

words.eng_def: a set of instructions for a computer

sentences.en: The data we found could possibly show a new threat to health.
sentences.zh: 我们找到的数据可能显示一种新的健康威胁。

words.eng_def: something that can cause harm or danger

sentences.en: It is impossible to ignore this finding because it affects many people.
sentences.zh: 忽视这个发现是不可能的，因为它影响很多人。

words.eng_def: not able to happen or be done

sentences.en: The company hopes the new medicine will enable higher revenue next year.
sentences.zh: 公司希望新药能在明年带来更高的收入。

words.eng_def: money that a company gets from selling goods or services

sentences.en: Many people are afraid of getting cancer, and this experiment can help.
sentences.zh: 许多人害怕得癌症，这个实验可以提供帮助。

words.eng_def: a serious disease in which cells grow in a bad way

sentences.en: We need to stay active and healthy to fight disease.
sentences.zh: 我们需要保持活跃和健康来对抗疾病。

words.eng_def: doing a lot of things; not resting

sentences.en: The results will convince everyone that this medicine works.
sentences.zh: 结果将说服所有人这种药有效。

words.eng_def: to make someone believe something is true

sentences.en: The effects of the medicine vary depending on a person's age and environment.
sentences.zh: 这种药的效果因人年龄和环境而异。

words.eng_def: to be different from each other

quiz.question_en: How do you say '实验' in English?

quiz.question_cn: 哪个词的意思是“可能地”？

quiz.question_en: What is the English word for '说服'?

quiz.question_cn: 下面哪个词的意思是“威胁”？

quiz.question_en: What is the English for '使能够'?

image_prompts: A group of scientists in a lab doing a science experiment with colorful liquids in glass containers.
A person sitting at a desk with a notebook and pencil, writing down factors to consider before starting a project.
A computer screen showing lines of code with a red error message, and a person looking confused.
A large screen showing a graph with a red warning symbol, representing a threat to health.
A person shaking their head with a speech bubble saying 'Impossible!' while looking at a document.
A business graph showing an upward arrow for revenue, with a medicine bottle in the background.
A worried person holding their chest, with a thought bubble showing a cancer cell symbol.
A person jogging in a park with a green checkmark symbol for health, and a smiling face.
A group of people nodding in agreement while looking at a presentation slide showing positive results.
A split image showing two people of different ages and a background with nature and city, to show varying effects.
